    before_line = before_ascii[i]
    after_line = after_ascii[i]
    if before_line != after_line:
        for j in range(min(len(before_line), len(after_line))):
            if before_line[j] != after_line[j]:

# Show the indicator area now
print("\n=== Current indicator area ===")
for i in range(41, 48):
    if i < len(after_ascii):
        print(f"Row {i}: {after_ascii[i][18:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
